reasoning: Moving away from the 'Studio Mono Dark' template, this neo-brutalist approach uses stark contrast (black borders + pastel fills) to feel highly creative, energetic, and distinct. It appeals directly to creators and marketing teams by offering a workspace that feels like a physical, structured canvas.

typography.instruction: Use Cabinet Grotesk for all headers, maintaining tight tracking. Figtree for all readable UI elements. Never use Inter or Space Grotesk.

layout_and_spacing.general: Use generous padding (p-6 to p-12). Implement 'The Control Room' grid for the dashboard with gap-6. Keep containers structured.

components.button: bg-primary text-black border-2 border-black rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-y-[4px] active:translate-x-[4px] active:shadow-none font-bold px-6 py-3
components.card: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-xl p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] relative overflow-hidden
components.input: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] text-base font-medium
components.wizard_step: flex items-center gap-4 border-2 border-black p-4 rounded-xl bg-white
components.calendar_cell: border border-black p-2 min-h-[120px] bg-white relative hover:bg-gray-50
components.tone_slider: appearance-none w-full h-4 bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-full outline-none
components.badge: inline-flex px-3 py-1 border-2 border-black rounded-full font-bold text-xs uppercase shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

specific_views.auth: Split screen. Left: Abstract creative geometric image filling the pane with a 2px black border separating it from the right. Right: Clean, centered login/register form with social buttons (thick borders).
specific_views.dashboard: Bento grid of projects. Header with thick bottom border. 'Create Project' button acts as the massive primary CTA.
specific_views.wizard: 4 massive steps (Personas, Tone, Hook, Content). Top progress bar is a literal thick black track. Each step form uses oversized inputs and bold labels. Tone of Voice editor uses playful, large custom sliders.
specific_views.project_view: Left sidebar (border-r-2 border-black). Main view splits between a monthly/weekly calendar grid (thick lines) and a right-side drawer/feed for AI suggestions and media queue. Content cards on the calendar are brightly colored based on platform.

media_and_icons.icon_style: Duotone or Bold weight to match the thick borders.

images.description: Colorful geometric abstract art for the auth screen background
Abstract mosaic of colorful geometric shapes
Mockup/creative tools for empty states in dashboard or media library

accessibility_and_interactions.animations: Use framer-motion for page transitions and card mounting. Keep animations snappy, not overly smooth. E.g., spring with high stiffness.
accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All actionable elements must have descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-project-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Execute a complete restyling away from the dark/gold theme.
Install and use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Figtree for body.
Install @phosphor-icons/react for icons, use Bold or Duotone variants.
Implement the strict 'neo-brutalist' card style: white bg, 2px solid black border, and 4px solid black offset shadow. Do NOT use soft drop shadows anywhere.
Build the dashboard using a 'Bento' grid structure.
For the Project Wizard, ensure each step feels physically distinct, using the secondary (yellow) and primary (lavender) colors to indicate progress.
Use Shadcn UI but aggressively override the default Vercel aesthetic with the specified classes (thick borders, offset shadows).
